nasb.text: Though all the peoples walk Each in the name of his god, As for us, we will walk In the name of the Lord our God forever and ever.

esv.text: For all the peoples walk each in the name of its god, but we will walk in the name of the Lord our God forever and ever.

cnv.text: 雖然，萬民各奉自己神的名行事， 我們卻要永遠奉耶和華我們　神的名而行。”

ccb.text: 万民都遵从自己的神明， 但我们要永远遵从我们的上帝耶和华。
